pi_items.source: Verified against task description, export_result.sh REPORT_FILE variable, and verifier.py logic.
Verified against setup_task.sh ARCHIVE_DIR variable which directly modifies this directory to create the discrepancy.

privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically injects a random missing station (from a pool of known GE network stations: TOLI, GSI, KWP, SANI, BKB) and a random orphaned station (Z01-Z99) into the SeisComP archive located at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive/2024/GE during setup_task.sh. The expected output report path is strictly enforced as /home/ga/consistency_report.txt by export_result.sh and the verifier.
